category_sources: source_facts.description says Darker applies Black formatting only in changed regions; official README describes reformatting modified Python code.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is darker; official README title is Darker.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents what Darker does, supported formatters, usage, configuration, and integrations.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project URL and the official README documents the project.
tags_sources: Official README lists Black, Ruff formatter, isort, flynt, and pyupgrade support.
source_facts.description says it applies Black formatting only to changed regions and current_curation.tags includes cli.
